title: Introduction to Gatling
body: Gatling is an open-source load testing framework based on Scala and Akka.

title: HTTP Simulations in Gatling
body: HTTP simulations allow you to test RESTful APIs under load.

title: Kafka Load Testing
body: Testing Kafka producers and consumers at scale using Gatling.

title: Feeders and Data-Driven Tests
body: Feeders inject dynamic data into virtual user sessions.

title: Load Profiles Explained
body: Ramp, constant, step, and spike load profiles serve different testing goals.
